channel.title: linux on Gertm's blog
channel.description: Recent content in linux on Gertm's blog

item.title: Why I stopped using Linux
item.description: UPDATE: This is no longer true. I've only quit Linux for desktop for a little over a year. I've been using it again full-time on all of my desktops. TL;DR: Updating video drivers screwed my system once too many. Reinstalled to Windows and never looked back. Now the PC works for me, instead of me working to keep it running. As most people of my age, I started out on my parent’s computer.
